description: Lists the Drawing Sets in the specified Project.

parameters.name: filters[exclude_empty_sets]
parameters.description: If true, returns drawing sets that contain at least one drawing.

parameters.name: filters[only_attachable_sets]
parameters.description: If true, returns drawing sets that contain at least one published drawing.

parameters.name: filters[with_sketches]
parameters.description: If true, returns only drawing sets that contain at least one drawing sketch.

parameters.name: filters[with_measurements]
parameters.description: If true, returns only drawing sets that contain at least one measurement.

parameters.name: drawing_area_id
parameters.description: Filters to only drawing sets with a least one revision in that drawing area.

deletable.description: This field is deprecated and will always return false. It does not indicate whether the drawing set can be deleted or not.

published_drawings_count.description: Number of published Drawing Revisions in the Drawing Set. Requires a drawing_area_id param.

unpublished_drawings_count.description: Number of unpublished Drawing Revisions in the Drawing Set. Requires a drawing_area_id param.
